body.data: Please review CS-0000066 for Premium Support SLA (24x7, Tier 25). Bring the containment path, current reproduction detail, and documentation updates.

arguments.description: Review the internal escalation for CS-0000066 and confirm the next actions for Premium Support SLA (24x7, Tier 25).

arguments.title: Premium Support SLA Tier 25 escalation path

sub_task_list.user_prompt:
CS-0000066, which is case 66 for account 3, contact 1, and product 217, needs attention for premium support SLA risk. First, update the case to in progress, set its priority to high, assign it to 795, and mark it as escalated with the reason breach_risk.

Next, ask the IT problem and change engineer to create a new high-priority software incident for caller USER_045 through email, assign it to USER_045 in assignment group GROUP_002, and use the short description Internal escalation for CS-0000066 on Premium Support SLA (24x7, Tier 25). Also have them create a high-priority change in assess status with medium impact and medium risk.

Then ask the collaboration operations specialist to send an email from olivia.chen@techcorp.com to carlos.mendez@techcorp.com, nina.patel@techcorp.com, and priya.nair@techcorp.com with the subject CS-0000066 escalation review, and to create a meeting on the alice-primary calendar from 2026-05-11 10:30:00+08:00 to 2026-05-11 11:00:00+08:00.

Finally, ask the knowledge base maintenance specialist to update CSM knowledge article 326 with the title Premium Support SLA Tier 25 escalation path, publish it for internal visibility, keep it under product 217 with owner 795, and link it to case 66 as suggested.
